chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-440 of 2014 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For hearing of M.A No.14153/2018 28.10.2025 Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri, Assistant A.G Sindh *** None present on behalf of the petitioners. This petition was disposed of by means of Order dated 08.03.201 based on the statement of official respondents that case of the petitioners will be put up before the District Recruitment Committee, which shall decide it in accordance with law. Thereafter the petitioners filed the listed application alleging therein non-compliance of the directions. Pursuant to notice issued on listed application, the alleged contemnor No.2/District Education Officer (Primary) Hyderabad filed his report dated 26.05.2021, annexing therewith offer letters, issued in favour of the petitioners. Learned Assistant A.G submits that purpose of filing listed application has been served and prayed for its disposal accordingly. In view of the above since the purpose of filing listed application stood served, therefore, no further action is required thereon as such same stands disposed of accordingly. Office is directed to consign the file to Record Room. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
